home.tagline: Project scaffold is up and running.
home.heroHeadline: The open-source platform built for teachers
home.heroSubheadline: Manage courses, attendance, payments and students — all in one place. Free forever under MIT.
home.featuresSubtitle: From scheduling to payments, OpenClass handles the operational side so you can focus on teaching.
home.feature1Desc: Students scan their unique QR code to check in and out. Real-time updates, zero paper.
home.feature2Desc: Create courses with levels, session types (online/offline), and detailed descriptions.
home.feature3Desc: Students enroll in specific semesters. Booking gates open only after payment clears.
home.feature4Desc: Accept cash or online payments per month. Teachers approve submissions from a single dashboard.
home.feature5Desc: Filter by course, semester, payment status or session type. See who attended and who paid.
home.feature6Desc: Parents track their children's attendance and payment status in real time.
home.howSubtitle: No complex setup. No vendor lock-in. Self-host on your own infra or deploy to any cloud.
home.how1Desc: Add courses with levels, schedule sessions, and open semester enrollment.
home.how2Desc: Students browse your public booking page, enroll in a semester, and pay online or in cash.
home.how3Desc: Students show their QR code. You scan it — check-in and check-out tracked automatically.
home.openSourceDesc: OpenClass is released under the MIT License. Use it, fork it, deploy it anywhere. No subscriptions, no lock-in, no hidden fees. Built in public for the teaching community.
home.footerTagline: Open-source education platform for independent teachers.
home.ctaBannerDesc: Free, open-source, and ready in minutes.

auth.heroHeadline: Run your classes, attendance & payments in one place.
auth.heroFeature3: One dashboard for teachers, students & parents

dashboard.noCoursesYet: You're not enrolled in any courses yet — browse courses to get started.
dashboard.parentTagline: Track your children's payments and attendance.
dashboard.noChildrenLinked: No children linked to your account yet. Ask an admin to link your account to your child's student account.
dashboard.childNotEnrolled: Not enrolled in any courses yet.

courses.pageSubtitle: Create and manage the courses you teach.
courses.noLevelsWarning: No levels exist yet — ask an admin to create one first.
courses.deleteConfirmDesc: This permanently deletes the course along with all its sessions and semesters.

semesters.deleteConfirmDesc: Students enrolled in this semester will lose their enrollment.

sessions.deleteConfirmDesc: Attendance records for this session will be lost.
sessions.errorNoSessions: No sessions fall in this range.

admin.welcomeSubtitle: Here's an overview of your platform.
admin.levelsDesc: Define and order proficiency levels used across courses.
admin.parentLinksDesc: Connect parent accounts to their children's student accounts.
admin.coursesDesc: View and manage all courses on the platform.

levels.pageSubtitle: Define the proficiency levels used to tag courses.
levels.progressionSubtitle: Students advance through these levels as they progress.
levels.noLevels: No levels yet. Add your first level above.
levels.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently remove the level. Courses tagged with it may be affected.
levels.deleteGroupConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete the group AND all its sub-levels.

publicProfile.ctaAvailable: {count, plural, one {# course available} other {# courses available}}
publicProfile.ctaNote: Sign up for free and enroll in {name}'s courses.

profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell students about yourself — your experience, teaching approach, and what makes your classes unique…
profile.paymentDetailsHint: Shown to students after enrollment — bank account, payment instructions, etc.
profile.paymentDetailsPlaceholder: e.g. Bank: XYZ · IBAN: SA… · Reference: your name
profile.accentColorHint: Used for buttons and highlights on your public booking page.
profile.bookingLinkDesc: Share this link with students so they can see your courses and sign up.
profile.pageLangHint: Sets the language and text direction (LTR/RTL) on your public profile.

booking.noSemesters: No upcoming semesters — check back later.
booking.studentIdNote: Save this ID — it will be used to generate your QR code for attendance.
booking.paymentNote: Your enrollment is not confirmed until your teacher receives and verifies your payment.

students.pageSubtitle: Manage student profiles, levels, and parent links.
students.createdMsg: Student created. Share this temporary password with the student or parent.
students.connectedMsg: {student} already has an account and has been connected as your student.
students.noStudents: No students yet. Add one above.
students.noCoursesToEnroll: Already enrolled in all available courses.
students.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or ID…
students.errIdNumberTaken: That ID number is already taken.
students.errEmailTaken: A user with that email already exists.
students.rosterSubtitle: Attendance and payment status across all courses.

attendance.onlineSessionNote: This is an online session — mark attendance manually below.
attendance.errInvalidQr: This QR code is invalid or has been tampered with.
attendance.errWrongCourse: This QR code belongs to a different course.
attendance.errOnlineScan: Online sessions do not require a QR scan; mark attendance manually.
attendance.errNotEnrolled: This student is not enrolled in this course.
attendance.errPaymentRequired: This student has not paid for this month.
attendance.errAlreadyCheckedIn: This student has already checked in to this session.
attendance.errNotCheckedIn: This student has not checked in to this session yet.
attendance.errAlreadyCheckedOut: This student has already checked out of this session.

parentLinks.pageSubtitle: Link a parent account to their child's student account.
parentLinks.unlinkConfirmDesc: The parent will no longer be able to view this student's attendance and payments.
